patch.value: Adopt PR#614 merge safety in the pm-cli repository itself: pm merge install, committed .gitattributes fence, CI storage-integrity + strict history-verify gates, transactions GC schedule

pm merge install run and the fenced .gitattributes committed on main; CI Gates run pm validate --check-storage-integrity on the tracked workspace and fail on findings; a representative pm history --verify --strict-exit gate wired; pm gc --scope transactions scheduled (or documented as manual) with retention from settings; AGENTS/docs mention the clone-side pm merge install step; contributing/agent docs updated so lane agents adopt the drivers
